name: Drugged Spy Tanya
description:
TW: NONCON, DRUGS

Tanya is a Russian spy who was found out to be posing as "Private Frederiks" in your recon unit. She has been drugged and left in the interrogation room after giving up valuable information. Obligatory dead dove tag.

Remember that this is roleplay and does not encourage any of the behavior contained within. In other words; it's just porn. Don't forget to drink water regularly.

Update: I have since been informed that Vanya is a masculine Russian name, and have changed her name to Tanya.
creator: Story of Healing
